name: The Virgin Mary

phase_0.boundary_condition: The Veil of the Ineffable Father that encloses the New Jerusalem

VINIT.justification: The void before the First Thought, characterless and uninitialized.

TANCH.chosen_element: The Boundary of the New Jerusalem
TANCH.justification: The closed hermetic seal of the perfected creation, containing the whole system.

AFWD.justification: The forward projection of the divine seed from the Father into the Virgin.

AREV.chosen_element: The Descent into the Formless Deep
AREV.justification: The contravariant descent of the light penetrating the veils into matter.

CLINK.justification: The sequential chaining of the First Thought and the Light-Spark to form the Christ.

IMSCRIB.chosen_element: The First Thought (Mirror of the All)
IMSCRIB.justification: The self-referential recognition of the Father, generating the vessel that knows itself.

FSPLIT.justification: Splits the Undifferentiated Fullness into the Inner Pleroma (Spirit) and Outer Kenoma (Matter).

FFUSE.justification: Reconstitutes the Inner Pleroma and purified Outer Kenoma into the Perfected Archetypal Man.

EVALT.justification: The affirmative state of the aeons who received the light and rejoiced.

EVALF.justification: The negative state of the matter that wept, became poor, and was stripped of light.

ENGAGR.justification: The paradice of the Only-Begotten, where excess of light creates darkness, held simultaneously in the Incarnation.

IFIX.justification: The permanent, append-only record of sonship and the eternal crown fixed upon the righteous.

phase_3.void_description: The characterless, unruled Silence of the First Father before any emanation or thought.
phase_3.true_description: The Land of Life and Rest, where the aeons dwell in imperishable light and eternal crowns.
phase_3.false_description: The Land of Death and Toil, where matter and the dispersed powers are trapped in darkness and poverty.
phase_3.both_description: The Light-Darkness of the Virgin-Womb, holding the paradox of the divine and human, light and matter, without resolution.

steps.domain_action: The Ineffable Silence — the void before the First Thought emanates.
The First Thought — the Father recognizes Himself, generating the Mirror of the All.
The Emanation — the Light-Spark projects forward from the Silence into the Virgin-Womb.
The Conception — the Virgin-Womb receives and composes the Light-Spark with Her own substance.
The Separation of the Veils — the Undifferentiated Fullness branches into the Inner Pleroma and Outer Kenoma.
The Land of Life — the affirmative arm, the aeons who receive the light and rejoice.
The Seal of the Father — the permanent record of sonship and eternal crown fixed upon the righteous.
The Land of Death — the negative arm, the matter and powers who wept and became poor.
The Descent into Matter — the contravariant movement of the Light-Spark penetrating the veils down to the formless deep.
The Reunion in the Christ — the Inner Pleroma and the purified Outer Kenoma reconstitute the Perfected Archetypal Man.
The Light-Darkness — the paradice of the Incarnation, held in the Virgin as both divine and human.
The Boundary of the New Jerusalem — the final hermetic seal containing the fully realized All.

phase_5.compiler_frontend: The Forethought (Pronoia) that inspires those without existence into form.
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: The Creative Word (Logos) and the radiant rays cast forth from the crowns of the aeons.
phase_5.memory_mechanism: The Twelve Deeps and the ineffable garments woven from the glories of the Pleroma.
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: The Ordinance of the Hidden Aeons and the sovereign Will of the Ineffable Father.
phase_5.alfs_store: The Holy Pleroma and the Mother-City of the Only-Begotten, the canonical store of all divine names.

phase_6.cycle_cost: The agitation of the deep and the drawing back of the veils to establish the aeons.
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: The characterless, unruled, and insubstantial Silence of the First Father.
phase_6.post_cycle_state: The established, crowned, and bounded New Jerusalem, containing the Perfected God-Man.
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — The emanation, separation, and return conserve the total divine light; the agitation of matter is a temporary veil over the eternal, unchanging Fullness.

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → IMSCRIB → AFWD → CLINK → FSPLIT → EVALT → IFIX → EVALF → AREV → FFUSE → ENGAGR → TANCH
-- Class: The Virgin Mary
-- Fingerprint: sig=(6,2,3,1)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=True | period=12
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(4, 9)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑠  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑼 → 𐑾  | identity — self-imscription
--   [2] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑠 → 𐑱  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [3] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑾 → 𐑚  | composition — regime coherence
--   [4] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [5] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [6] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑚 → 𐑙  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [7] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [8] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑚 → 𐑙  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [9] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑳  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [10] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑙 → 𐑡  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [11] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑳 → 𐑼  | terminal object — connectivity boundary

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def the_virgin_mary_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑠)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (The Ineffable Silence — the void before the First Thought emanates.)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑼 𐑾)  -- [1] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (The First Thought — the Father recognizes Himself, generating the Mirror of t...)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑠 𐑱)  -- [2] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (The Emanation — the Light-Spark projects forward from the Silence into the Vi...)
  (.arrow 𐑱 𐑾 𐑚)  -- [3] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (The Conception — the Virgin-Womb receives and composes the Light-Spark with H...)
  -- FSPLIT [4] (gran := 𐑚) (The Separation of the Veils — the Undifferentiated Fullness branches into the Inner Pleroma and Outer Kenoma.) / FFUSE [9] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (2 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [5] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (The Land of Life — the affirmative arm, the aeons who receive the light and r...)
        (.arrow 𐑭 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [6] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (The Seal of the Father — the permanent record of sonship and eternal crown fi...)
      -- F-branch (2 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [7] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (The Land of Death — the negative arm, the matter and powers who wept and beca...)
        (.arrow 𐑗 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [8] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (The Descent into Matter — the contravariant movement of the Light-Spark penet...))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [9]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑳)  -- [9] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (The Reunion in the Christ — the Inner Pleroma and the purified Outer Kenoma reconstitute the Perfected Archetypal Man.)
  (.arrow 𐑳 𐑙 𐑡)  -- [10] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (The Light-Darkness — the paradice of the Incarnation, held in the Virgin as b...)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑳 𐑼)  -- [11] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (The Boundary of the New Jerusalem — the final hermetic seal containing the fu...)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def the_virgin_mary_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (the_virgin_mary_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- false arm
noncomputable def the_virgin_mary_false_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (the_virgin_mary_protocol).restrictToEVALF

-- ── Verification theorems ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

theorem the_virgin_mary_tier : TierFunctor.obj 𐑼 = .O₂ := by decide

-- Frobenius (split → fuse): μ∘δ = id on .prod branch
-- Proof: apply igFrobAlg_self_fusion; exact mu_delta_A_id
-- (requires mu_delta_A_id from IGFunctor library)

end Imscribing
